title: Korbond Needlework 4 Inch (10cm) – Soft Grip Professional, Household, Fabric, Paper Scissors. Ambidextrous – for Right & Left Handed
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting and clothes care accessories and tools
Korbond needlework scissors feature precision ground blades to ensure accurate pattern and fabric cutting every time. Guaranteed to cut right to the tip of the blade.
The large handle and overall lightweight makes these shears comfortable to use for extended periods of time, and the specially designed curves make them suitable for both left and right-handed users.
Ideal for sewing, crafting, quilting, thick and light Fabrics, paper crafts, household and kitchen use.

description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair 4" Needlework Scissor Available Now More Products From Korbond care & repair General Purpose Scissors Tape Measure 160m Polyester Threads Korbond Care & Repair Needlework Scissors 4 inch Korbond Needlework Scissors are small with sharp precision tips, ideal for producing intricate and delicate finishes in embroidery, cross stitch, quilting and much more. Contents Include: 1 pair of 4’’ scissors for a range of needlework purposes Handy Usages for Korbond Care & Repair Needlework Scissors Small & Mighty Stainless steel blades for longer lasting sharpness, with anti-rust/tarnish properties. Needlework Scissors are ambidextrous and make easy work of cutting out small, angular, intricate patterns and fabrics. Thread & Yarn Snipping An essential to any sewing room. Needlework Scissors are particularly handy for snipping through threads and yarns without creating uneven or frayed ends. Trimming Applique Intricate, fine cutting requires precision. With 4 inch stainless steel blades and an ambidextrous handle, these Needlework Scissors make child’s play of cutting out tricky, intricate shapes. Travel Wash Bag Essential Needlework Scissors are the perfect size to keep in a wash / beauty bag. Small, light and sharp, they are great for trimming wispy beard hairs, shaping false eyelashes and cutting through hard to open packaging.
